name: Drag n Drop: Word Match
description: Word Match - Objects Edition is a lightweight, mobile-responsive HTML5 puzzle game designed specifically for children to learn and play. The game uses an intuitive drag-and-drop mechanic where players match English words to their corresponding emojis.
instructions: Touchscreens Mobile Tablet Players press and hold a word card then drag it over to the matching emoji target Mouse PC Desktop Players click and hold the left mouse button on a word move the cursor to the correct emoji and release to match
